scenes.description: 一个阳光明媚的户外场景中，一个小男孩穿着卡通动物连帽外套，在蓝色健身器材上认真锻炼。周围绿树成荫，背景可见建筑物轮廓，整体氛围轻松活泼。
scenes.video_prompt: A young boy in a cartoon animal costume with a hooded jumpsuit sits on a simple blue outdoor fitness machine, mimicking adult exercise movements with focused determination. He is surrounded by lush green trees and soft sunlight filtering through the leaves, creating a cheerful park-like environment. The background features faint outlines of residential buildings. Shot in natural daylight with vibrant colors, the scene radiates childlike energy and joy. Camera slowly pans to follow his motion. 4K resolution, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field.

style_elements.characters: Young boy in a playful animal-themed hooded outfit, wearing a hat, expressive and engaged
style_elements.environment: Sunny outdoor park setting with greenery, trees, and distant urban structures
style_elements.visual_style: Bright, natural lighting with saturated greens and blues, family-friendly and uplifting tone
style_elements.camera_movement: Slow lateral pan tracking the child's movement on the equipment

scenes.description: 夜晚场景中，一位浅粉色波浪卷发的女性身穿白色长裙，化着精致浓妆，骑在一匹白马背上，手持黑色缰绳，面带微笑望向镜头。背景有朦胧灯光点缀，营造出梦幻浪漫的氛围。
scenes.video_prompt: A graceful woman with long pastel pink wavy hair rides a white horse at night, dressed in an elegant flowing white gown and dramatic makeup. She gently holds black reins and smiles softly toward the camera. The dark background is dotted with blurred golden lights, creating a dreamy, ethereal atmosphere. Moonlight enhances the contrast between her luminous dress and the shadowy surroundings. Slow-motion close-up shot from a low angle emphasizing elegance and mystery. Cinematic color grading, 4K UHD, shallow focus, soft bokeh effects.

style_elements.characters: Elegant woman with pink curls, wearing a white formal dress and bold makeup, riding confidently
style_elements.environment: Nighttime outdoor setting with ambient background lights and dark silhouettes
style_elements.visual_style: Dark, romantic, high-contrast visuals with soft glow and bokeh lighting effects
style_elements.camera_movement: Low-angle slow-motion close-up with slight upward tilt
